title: To The Men And Brethren Of The Masonic Lodge At Tarbolton.
content:
Within your dear mansion may wayward contention
            Or withering envy ne'er enter:
        May secrecy round be the mystical bound,
            And brotherly love be the centre.

    Edinburgh, 23 August, 1787.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Robert Burns delivers a powerful performance in "To The Men And Brethren Of The Masonic Lodge At Tarbolton."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
